privileged_info_summary: The task configures GeoWebCache tile caching for the ne:ne_countries layer, which is derived from Natural Earth's public domain Admin 0 Countries dataset at 1:110m scale (ne_110m_admin_0_countries shapefile). The layer uses EPSG:4326 (WGS84 geographic) as the primary gridset with EPSG:900913 (Web Mercator) as a secondary gridset. Tile seeding is triggered for EPSG:4326 gridset at zoom levels 0–3 with image/png format covering the full world extent (minX=-180, maxX=180, minY=-90, maxY=90). Natural Earth data is public domain and contains 258 country polygons globally available from https://www.naturalearthdata.com/. The verifier checks for tile layer existence, gridset configuration, PNG format support, and evidence of triggered seeding operations via REST API or access logs.
